notes: Closed entries include a reason in issue. Actionable-open entries are true schema gaps or follow-up propagation buckets, not ignored mechanics.

abi-dalzims-horrid-wilting::choice_or_mo.issue: Closed: the only caster choice is the ordinary point selected for the 30-foot cube, already represented by ranged area targeting.
abi-dalzims-horrid-wilting::choice_or_mo.recommendedTemplateChange: No template change needed beyond existing area targeting.
abi-dalzims-horrid-wilting::choice_or_mo.recommendedJsonChange: No JSON change needed beyond existing ranged Cube area targeting.

abi-dalzims-horrid-wilting::attack_or_sa.issue: Closed: plants and water elementals now have an explicit disadvantage save modifier in structured fields and runtime JSON.
abi-dalzims-horrid-wilting::attack_or_sa.recommendedTemplateChange: Added numbered Save Modifier structured fields.
abi-dalzims-horrid-wilting::attack_or_sa.recommendedJsonChange: Added effects[0].condition.saveModifiers with a filtered disadvantage rule.

abi-dalzims-horrid-wilting::created_obje.issue: Closed: detector false positive from material sponge/moisture wording; the spell creates no object or structure.

abi-dalzims-horrid-wilting::resource_or_.issue: Closed: material component is non-costly and not consumed; existing component fields already preserve the resource facts.

abi-dalzims-horrid-wilting::status_or_st.issue: Closed: Constructs and Undead are now excluded from the affected target set rather than hidden in description prose.
abi-dalzims-horrid-wilting::status_or_st.recommendedJsonChange: Added targeting.filter.excludeCreatureTypes and effect targetFilter exclusions.

abi-dalzims-horrid-wilting::environmenta.issue: Closed: moisture-drawing wording is the damage narration, not a persistent environmental state change.

animal-shapes::choice_or_mode.issue: Closed: Beast-form selection, per-target different forms, and stat replacement are now exposed as structured utility options and runtime control options.
animal-shapes::choice_or_mode.recommendedTemplateChange: Added Utility Option rows for Beast form, repeat transformation, stat replacement, and equipment merge.
animal-shapes::choice_or_mode.recommendedJsonChange: Added effects[0].controlOptions with the same mode details.

animal-shapes::attack_or_save_modifier.issue: Closed: detector false positive from Challenge Rating text; no attack roll or saving throw modifier exists.

animal-shapes::sustain_or_recast_action.issue: Closed: the later-turn Magic action to transform targets again is now a granted runtime action and structured utility option.
animal-shapes::sustain_or_recast_action.recommendedTemplateChange: Added Utility Option 2 for repeat transformation.
animal-shapes::sustain_or_recast_action.recommendedJsonChange: Added effects[0].grantedActions action with each_turn frequency.

animal-shapes::vision_light_sound.issue: Closed: "can see within range" is ordinary line-of-sight targeting, already represented by Line of Sight true.

animal-shapes::message_or_communication.issue: Closed: communication is a retained statistic during transformation, now named in the stat replacement utility option.
animal-shapes::message_or_communication.recommendedTemplateChange: Added retained-communication detail under Utility Option 3.
animal-shapes::message_or_communication.recommendedJsonChange: Added retained-communication detail under the Stat replacement control option.

animal-shapes::healing_or_restoration.issue: Closed: temporary hit points equal to the first Beast form HP are now represented with Temporary HP structured data and a HEALING temporary-HP runtime effect.
animal-shapes::healing_or_restoration.recommendedTemplateChange: Added Temporary HP and Healing Dice structured rows.
animal-shapes::healing_or_restoration.recommendedJsonChange: Added a HEALING effect with isTemporaryHp true and dice set to the chosen Beast Hit Points formula text.

animal-shapes::object_stats_or_damageabi.issue: Closed: equipment merging and unusability are now represented as a structured/runtime utility option; the spell does not create a damageable object stat block.

animal-shapes::conditional_ending.issue: Closed: target-ended transformation as a Bonus Action remains in the canonical description; a richer per-target voluntary ending field is still a later schema bucket.
animal-shapes::conditional_ending.recommendedTemplateChange: No immediate template change beyond existing description and utility options.
animal-shapes::conditional_ending.recommendedJsonChange: No immediate JSON change beyond preserving the exact canonical description.

animal-shapes::aftermath_or_memory.issue: Closed: detector matched "when the spell ends"; there is no memory or aftermath mechanic beyond temporary HP expiration, now represented by the temporary-HP effect description.
animal-shapes::aftermath_or_memory.recommendedTemplateChange: No separate aftermath template field needed.
animal-shapes::aftermath_or_memory.recommendedJsonChange: No separate aftermath JSON field needed.

antimagic-field::travel_or_planar_moveme.issue: Closed: teleport, planar travel, portal suppression, area exclusion, spell suppression, and magic-item suppression are now split into structured utility options and runtime control options.
antimagic-field::travel_or_planar_moveme.recommendedTemplateChange: Added Antimagic Field utility-option rows for each suppression/blocking mode.
antimagic-field::travel_or_planar_moveme.recommendedJsonChange: Added effects[0].controlOptions and marked the emanation as following the caster.

antipathy-sympathy::choice_or_mode.issue: Closed: Antipathy, Sympathy, and Ending the Effect are now explicit structured utility options and runtime control options; JSON prompts for the caster choice.
antipathy-sympathy::choice_or_mode.recommendedTemplateChange: Added Utility Option rows and AI choice prompt coverage.
antipathy-sympathy::choice_or_mode.recommendedJsonChange: Added aiContext prompt plus control options for both modes and ending logic.

antipathy-sympathy::attack_or_save_modif.issue: Closed: the initial and ending Wisdom saves are now represented by save-based STATUS_CONDITION effects and repeat-save metadata.
antipathy-sympathy::attack_or_save_modif.recommendedJsonChange: Added Frightened and Charmed STATUS_CONDITION effects with Wisdom saves and repeat-save metadata.

antipathy-sympathy::forced_movement.issue: Closed: safest-route movement away/toward the target is now represented by structured Forced Movement and a runtime MOVEMENT effect.
antipathy-sympathy::forced_movement.recommendedTemplateChange: Added Movement Type and Forced Movement rows.
antipathy-sympathy::forced_movement.recommendedJsonChange: Added MOVEMENT effect with forced safest-route semantics.

antipathy-sympathy::social_or_knowledge_.issue: Closed: Charmed mode and the creature-kind choice are now surfaced through Conditions Applied, utility options, target filter notes, and the runtime choice prompt.
antipathy-sympathy::social_or_knowledge_.recommendedTemplateChange: Added Conditions Applied and Target Filter Notes.
antipathy-sympathy::social_or_knowledge_.recommendedJsonChange: Added Charmed STATUS_CONDITION effect and aiContext prompt.

antipathy-sympathy::status_or_state_chan.issue: Closed: Frightened and Charmed are now explicit structured conditions and runtime STATUS_CONDITION effects.
antipathy-sympathy::status_or_state_chan.recommendedJsonChange: Added separate Frightened and Charmed STATUS_CONDITION effects.

antipathy-sympathy::conditional_ending.issue: Closed: distance-based ending save, damage-triggered Sympathy save, and 1-minute immunity are preserved in structured utility options and runtime control-option detail.
antipathy-sympathy::conditional_ending.recommendedTemplateChange: Added Ending the Effect utility option.
antipathy-sympathy::conditional_ending.recommendedJsonChange: Added Ending the Effect control option.

clone::choice_or_mode.issue: Closed: clone age choice, clone formation, soul transfer, and original-remains consequences are now split into structured utility options and runtime control options; JSON also prompts for lifecycle tracking.
clone::choice_or_mode.recommendedTemplateChange: Added Clone utility options and changed targeting to creature_or_object with objects included.
clone::choice_or_mode.recommendedJsonChange: Added control options, included objects in validTargets, and added aiContext prompt for delayed lifecycle tracking.

animal-shapes.canonicalEvidence: Choose any number of willing creatures that you can see within range.
animal-shapes.structuredState: Targeting Type: multi | Targeting Max: unlimited | Valid Targets: willing_creature
animal-shapes.jsonState: Runtime JSON uses targeting.type multi, but maxTargets is a temporary numeric stand-in because the schema lacks an unlimited sentinel.
animal-shapes.issue: Actionable open: Animal Shapes exposes a corpus-level unlimited-target mechanic that the runtime maxTargets schema cannot represent without a fake number.
animal-shapes.recommendedTemplateChange: Add a schema-safe unlimited/not_applicable sentinel for Targeting Max and propagate it across structured spell fields.
animal-shapes.recommendedJsonChange: Expand ScalableNumber or maxTargets to accept an explicit unlimited sentinel, then replace Animal Shapes maxTargets=999 with that value.
animal-shapes.closedReason: Closed by expanding the shared targeting.maxTargets contract to accept the explicit `unlimited` sentinel and replacing Animal Shapes' runtime 999 placeholder with `unlimited`; structured markdown already recorded Targeting Max as unlimited.

antipathy-sympathy.canonicalEvidence: Then specify a kind of creature, such as red dragons, goblins, or vampires. A creature of the chosen kind makes a Wisdom saving throw when it comes within 120 feet of the target.
antipathy-sympathy.structuredState: Target Filter Sizes: Huge or smaller | Target Filter Notes records the caster-specified creature kind.
antipathy-sympathy.jsonState: Runtime targeting.filter.sizes records Huge or smaller, but there is no typed field for caster-specified creature kind or a 120-foot proximity trigger around the target.
antipathy-sympathy.issue: Actionable open: caster-specified creature-kind filters and proximity-trigger saves are still richer than the current target filter and trigger schema.
antipathy-sympathy.recommendedTemplateChange: Add structured fields for caster-specified creature kind and proximity-trigger radius around a spell target.
antipathy-sympathy.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime fields for open-ended creature-kind filters and a proximity trigger such as on_enter_target_radius with radius/duration/immunity metadata.

clone.canonicalEvidence: An inert duplicate of that creature forms inside the vessel used in the spell's casting and finishes growing after 120 days.
clone.structuredState: Utility options now describe clone formation, but no durable created-entity lifecycle schema exists.
clone.jsonState: Runtime controlOptions and aiContext preserve the lifecycle, but there is no created-entity lifecycle object for delayed growth and vessel disturbance.
clone.issue: Actionable open: Clone needs a delayed created-entity/lifecycle schema rather than only utility option text.
clone.recommendedTemplateChange: Add created-entity lifecycle fields for formation delay, vessel dependency, inert state, activation trigger, and age choice.
clone.recommendedJsonChange: Add a runtime createdEntity/lifecycle object with growth duration, activation trigger, soul-transfer prerequisites, and equipment/remains consequences.

clone.canonicalEvidence: The clone is physically identical to the original and has the same personality, memories, and abilities, but none of the original's equipment.
clone.structuredState: Utility options record same personality, memories, and abilities.
clone.jsonState: Runtime controlOptions preserve the same facts as text, but no identity/memory transfer fields exist.
clone.issue: Actionable open: Clone exposes identity, memories, soul location, and revival lockout mechanics that need a dedicated life-state schema.
clone.recommendedTemplateChange: Add life-state/identity transfer fields for soul transfer, memory/personality continuity, equipment exclusion, and revival lockout.
clone.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime lifeStateTransition fields that can be ignored when not applicable and consumed by resurrection/death systems later.
